title: South African TV star arrested after allegedly kidnapping man in girlfriend dispute
summary_full: Molemo "Jub Jub" Maarohanye is accused of trapping a taxi driver in a car and firing a gun in the man's direction.
summary_public: Molemo "Jub Jub" Maarohanye is accused of trapping a taxi driver in a car and firing a gun in the man's direction.
